name: 爬取古诗词网
xml: import sys said = [] # -*- coding: utf-8 -*- #author:zxy #Date:2018-10-19 import requests import re HEADERS={ "User-Agent":"Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 6.1; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) " "Chrome/69.0.3497.100 Safari/537.36" } def parse_url(url): response=requests.get(url,headers=HEADERS) text=response.text titles=re.findall(r'.*?(.*?)',text,re.DOTALL) #r raw dynasties=re.findall(r'.*?(.*?)',text,re.DOTALL) authors=re.findall(r'.*?(.*?)',text,re.DOTALL) content_tags=re.findall(r'(.*?)',text,re.DOTALL) contents=[] for content_tag in content_tags: x=re.sub('<.*?>','',content_tag) xx=re.sub('。', '。\n',x) contents.append(xx.strip()) poems=[] for value in zip(titles,dynasties,authors,contents): title,dynasty,author,content=value poem={ "title":title, "dynasty":dynasty, "author":author, "content":content } poems.append(poem) with open('poems.txt','w',encoding="utf-8") as f: for poem in poems: for (key,value) in poem.items(): if(key=="title"): f.write("{}\n".format(value)) if (key == "dynasty"): f.write("\t{}\n".format(value)) if(key=="author"): str="\t{}\n" f.write(str.format(value)) if(key=="content"): for i in list: said.append(value) f.write("{}\n\n\n".format(value)) # print(x+"{}\n\n\n".format(value)) while True: a = input() url="https://so.gushiwen.cn/search.aspx?value="+a parse_url(url)
